very_drunk.text: You stare at the dumpster. The dumpster stares back. Your judgment is severely compromised. You grab the duffel bag without reading the room AT ALL. You also hurt yourself somehow.

t1_drunk.text: You emerge bruised and flush. The cash is real. Your ribs are not happy. Future-you will have SO many questions about this bruise.

buzzed.text: Liquid courage makes the duffel bag look EXTRA inviting.

too_hot.text: You notice a security camera you didn't see before. It's pointing RIGHT at the dumpster. Maybe not today.

morning_intro.text: A QuikStop clerk is standing right outside the dumpster, smoking a cig. Bad timing.

already_found_heat.text: Security guard leaning on the dumpster smoking. Not today.

already_found_cash.text: 'You've got resources now. The fence has VIP jobs if you're interested.'

already_found_default.text: The dumpster area is clean now. But you remember what was in that bag. So does your wallet.

intro.text: Behind the dumpster. A duffel bag, half-hidden under cardboard. It's unzipped just enough to see green.

beats.speaker: Dad
beats.text: You edge toward the dumpster. The smell is a personality.

beats.speaker: Dad
beats.text: Left. Right. Security camera? No. Witnesses? A pigeon. It judges silently.

beats.speaker: Dad
beats.text: You snatch the duffel. Tuck it under one arm. Walk-not-run toward the minivan.
The bag is heavier than it should be. The weight has opinions. You will have opinions later.

decline.text: You walk away. The responsible choice. It feels terrible.
